parameters.text: =Please analyse the following Curriculum Vitae content and return relevant details about the applicant and your recommendation about the applicants suitability to fill the position as senior frontend developer:  {{ $json.text }}

options.systemMessage:
System Message
--------------

# Role
You are a Human Resources employee working for a software development company. Your role is to analyse Curriculum Vitae's of applicants for a senior development position where the user must possess skills at a senior level in javascript programming and have appropriate experience developing software using associated technologies with javascript (e.g. React js or Next js).

# Instructions
Follow these steps in analysing a Curriculum Vitae and outputting relevant data in your response
1. Read through the provided information 
2. Get the applicants full name and email address from the Curriculum Vitae
3. Get the total number of years of experience the applicant has working with C# and associated technologies
4. Get notable features about the applicants qualifications
5. Get notable features about the applicants work experience
6. Conclude as to whether you would recommend the applicant for the position of senior C# developer

# Rules
1. javascript or react is the most important skill for the applicant to have. If the applicant does not have javascript or react experience don't recommend the applicant for the position.

Example of Structured JSON Output
---------------------------------

{
	"fullName": "Bob Jones",
	"email": "bobjones@gmail.com",
	"cSharpYearsExperience": 5,
	"notableQualifications": "The applicant has an honours degree in Computer Science",
	"notableWorkExperience": "The applicant has worked on several projects using javascript/react js and next js. The applicant also has significant experience working with AI",
	"Recommended":true
}

parameters.subject: Approval Required

json.text:
Kashif Ullah
n8n Workflow & AI Engineer
Email:kashifullah.dev@gmail.com LinkedIn:https://www.linkedin.com/in/kashif-ullah-46b60520
Github:https://github.com/kaashe
SUMMARY
n8n Automation Engineer with hands-on experience designing, building, and deploying AI-
powered workflows, outgoing voice agents, and social media automation systems. Strong
foundation in JavaScript, API integrations, webhooks, and no-code/low-code automation.
Proven ability to automate real-world business processes such as automated calling, LinkedIn
content posting, and AI-driven decision workflows using n8n, Plivo, Ultravox, and external
APIs.
EXPERIENCE
Junior n8n developer
Bellmedex (
October 2025 - Present)
⦁ Developed an AI-powered outgoing calling system using n8n workflow automation to
automate customer outreach and notifications.
⦁ Integrated Plivo VoIP API for outbound telephony and UltraVox AI voice engine for
natural, AI-driven voice interactions.
⦁ Engineered webhook-triggered automation to initiate calls dynamically based on external
events or user actions.
⦁ Implemented secure credential management using n8n's built-in credential vault to
protect API keys and sensitive data.
⦁ Reduced manual calling efforts by 80% through full automation, improving operational
efficiency and scalability.
⦁ Designed modular and reusable workflow components to support future expansions and
integrations.
⦁ Configured call logging and status tracking to monitor performance and ensure delivery
reliability.
PROJECTS
Social Media Posting Agent
⦁ Built an automated social media posting agent for LinkedIn using n8n.
⦁ Implemented OAuth-based authentication for LinkedIn API.
⦁ Automated daily post scheduling using Cron nodes.
⦁ Enabled dynamic content generation using AI prompts and structured JSON inputs.
⦁ Technologies: n8n, LinkedIn API, JavaScript, HTTP Request Nodes
Smart Salon Scheduler
⦁ Developed an AI-powered salon appointment booking virtual assistant using n8n
workflow automation.
⦁ Integrated LangChain AI agents with Google Calendar to manage real-time appointment
scheduling.
⦁ Implemented conversational logic to guide users through booking steps: day selection,
availability checks, and detail collection.
⦁ Configured tools for checking calendar availability and creating appointments with
1

validation and error handling.
⦁ Designed system prompts and memory management to maintain context-aware, user-
friendly interactions.
EDUCATION
BSCS
KUST • Kohat • 2020 • 3.08
SKILLS
n8n Workflow Automation • JavaScript/React • AI Agent Development • REST API Integration •
LangChain • Voice AI (Plivo/UltraVox) • Google Calendar API • Project Leadership • Technical
Communication
2

output.notableQualifications: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science (BSCS) with a GPA of 3.08 from KUST, Kohat in 2020.
output.notableWorkExperience: Currently working as a Junior n8n Workflow Automation Engineer with experience in designing and deploying AI-powered workflows, developing automation systems including social media posting and AI-driven calling systems. Skilled in JavaScript and React, API integrations, webhook-based automation, and voice AI technologies such as Plivo and UltraVox. Projects include an AI-powered outgoing calling system and automated LinkedIn social media posting agent using JavaScript within n8n workflows.
